summary: W1414 adds a checked closed-map target-no-univ-data stable convergence guard tying W972 through W971 into the closed-map route chain. The original four-task product goal remains open.

OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations lacks the original-four-task completion witness.
Required negative fixtures remain incomplete for several premature-success patterns.
External final readonly audit is expected to fail until terminal_outcome.outcome is product_success.
remaining_work: Advance the remaining Lean route blockers after W1414, including downstream W973+ field splits, packet blockers, and any completion-contract blockers still recorded by the audits.
